summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Epicenter Hi-Fi music player after UI redesign from Glassmorphism to Apple Music monochromatic style. All requested features are working perfectly.
passed_tests: Main Player view loads with pure black background (#000000)
Tab navigation works perfectly (Ahora, Cola, EQ, DSP)
Queue view shows empty message and 'Agregar Música' button
Equalizer view displays all 12 vertical sliders with frequency labels (32Hz-16kHz)
EQ ON/OFF switch present and functional
DSP view shows all 5 knobs (SWEEP, WIDTH, INTENSITY, BALANCE, VOLUME)
DSP ON/OFF switch with LED indicator changes state correctly
Add music button (+) present in header
All playback controls present (prev, play/pause, next)
EQ reset button present and working
Apple Music monochromatic design successfully implemented
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Smooth transitions and professional audio equipment styling
